requirements_addressed: All modified files pass lint/format checks

completion_promises.criterion_text: call_agent_tool() before connect() raises RuntimeError with "not connected"
completion_promises.evidence: Test test_call_agent_tool_before_connect_raises_runtime_error verifies RuntimeError with 'not connected' message is raised when _nc is None. Implementation checks self._nc is None and raises RuntimeError('client is not connected').

Test test_call_agent_tool_publishes_to_correct_topic verifies the topic passed to _nc.request() is exactly 'agents.guardkit-factory.tools.lint'. Implementation uses Topics.resolve(Topics.Agents.TOOLS, agent_id=agent_id, tool_name=tool_name).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Response from target agent is JSON-decoded and returned
completion_promises.evidence: Test test_call_agent_tool_returns_json_decoded_response verifies mock response with JSON {"status": "success", "count": 42} is decoded and returned as a Python dict. Implementation uses json.loads(response.data).

completion_promises.criterion_text: No response within timeout raises TimeoutError with agent_id and tool_name in message
completion_promises.evidence: Tests test_call_agent_tool_timeout_raises_timeout_error and test_call_agent_tool_no_responders_raises_timeout_error verify that both nats.errors.TimeoutError and nats.errors.NoRespondersError are caught and re-raised as built-in TimeoutError with message containing agent_id, tool_name, and timeout value.

Tests test_call_agent_tool_wildcard_agent_id_raises_value_error (agent_id='evil.>') and test_call_agent_tool_wildcard_tool_name_raises_value_error (tool_name='evil*tool') verify ValueError is raised. Validation is delegated to Topics.resolve() which calls _validate_identifier().

Test test_call_agent_tool_forwards_timeout_to_request passes timeout=15.5 and verifies it appears in the keyword args of the _nc.request() call. Implementation passes timeout=timeout directly to _nc.request().

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check src/nats_core/client.py returned 'All checks passed!'. mypy src/nats_core/client.py returned 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'. Pre-existing ruff warnings in test_client.py (unused asyncio import, import sorting) are unrelated to this task's changes.
